title: MikroTik RouterBOARD C52iG-5HaxD2HaxD-TC, hAP ax2
description: The 6th generation hAP router from MikroTik is here. This small router for homes and small businesses hAP ax2 or C52iG-5HaxD2HaxD-TC has an L4 license, desktop design and includes 5 Gigabit ports of which the 1st port supports PoE in and PoE out. In addition, the router has two radio parts supporting 802.11a/b/g/n/ac/ax standards allowing simultaneous operation in both bands.
